Positioned on the first floor of a four-storey structure, the apartment ensures easy access while maintaining a pleasant level of privacy. Its east-facing orientation enhances natural light and creates a bright, welcoming atmosphere throughout the day.Property SpecificationsSpanning a super built-up area of 1310 sq. ft with a carpet area of 1170 sq. ft, this semi-furnished apartment is thoughtfully planned for efficient space utilisation. It comprises three well-proportioned bedrooms and two bathrooms, making it suitable for modern family living. The layout includes separate living and dining areas, providing a structured and functional interior arrangement. Two balconies offer additional space for relaxation and ventilation. The apartment also features a dedicated puja room, catering to traditional lifestyle preferences. The kitchen is modular in design, ensuring practicality for everyday use. The interiors are finished with marble flooring, adding a touch of elegance and durability. Being a newly constructed, ready-to-move property under freehold ownership, it ensures modern construction quality and long-term value.FacilitiesThe building is equipped with essential amenities to support a comfortable lifestyle, including lift access, 24-hour water supply, and reliable power backup. Security features such as CCTV surveillance and on-site personnel provide a safe and secure environment. The apartment includes one covered parking space for added convenience. With only a limited number of units in the building, residents benefit from a quieter and less crowded living experience.LocalityLocated on Hulimavu Main Road, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to key parts of Bangalore. The area is well-developed with easy access to schools, hospitals, markets, and public transport facilities. The metro station is approximately 800 metres away, making daily commuting convenient, while essential services such as schools and hospitals are within about 1 km. With its strategic location and growing infrastructure, Hulimavu remains a preferred residential destination for those seeking a balance of urban connectivity and residential comfort.
